title: Staff X-Ray
description: A powerful and optimised X-Ray for your server's staff
body:
# 🛠 StaffXRay

***A powerful and optimized X-Ray tool for staff members.***

Detect hidden ores around players with clean glowing outlines — no texture packs, no client mods required.


## ✨ Features
* 🔎 Highlight specific ores around the player
* 🎯 Custom ore selection GUI
* 💎 Supports all major overworld ores
* 🪨 Automatically includes deepslate variants
* 🌈 Colored glowing outlines per ore type
* 👁 Visible only to the staff member using it
* ⚡ Lightweight and easy to use
* 🌍 Multi-language support (configurable)


## 🖥 How It Works

Staff members can open a clean selection GUI and choose which ores to highlight.

The plugin uses BlockDisplay entities with glowing outlines to show ore positions in real time — fully server-side.

No client modifications required.


## 🎮 Command

`/xray` — Open the ore selector GUI


## 🔐 Intended Use

StaffXRay is designed for:
* Cheater detection
* Suspicious mining investigations
* Staff moderation tools

This plugin is not intended for survival gameplay advantage.


## ⚙ Configuration

You can:
* Change the plugin language in `config.yml`
* Fully customize all messages
* Modify the plugin's prefix
* Add your own translations inside the `lang/` folder


## 📦 Requirements
* Minecraft 1.20+
* Spigot or Paper (Paper recommended)
* Java 17+


## 🚀 Why StaffXRay?

Unlike traditional X-Ray tools:
* No messy armor stands
* No scoreboard glow abuse
* Clean visual overlays
* Modern entity-based rendering
* Easy to toggle and update selections
